    • Donut maps with DonutMap

DonutMap: donut maps with sf and ggplot2

Source: R/DonutMap-package.R
DonutMap-package.Rd

DonutMap creates donut charts positioned on a map from tidy data. The main static entry point is donut_map(). The main interactive entry point is donut_leaflet(). Use donut_polygons() when you need the sf polygon layer directly, and flow_lines() when you need origin-destination line geometries.

Author
